free_text: Quantitative Tests of s-PROCESS in Stellar
Isotopic samples were obtained on loan from the AEC
Division of Research Cross Section Pool.
Pulsed neutrons are produced by ~1 nsec
bursts of protons which bombard a 7Li target.
The neutron energy spread(FWHM), governed by the 7Li
target thickness and proton energy spread,
gamma detectors gated on 10B-NaI neutron monitor.

Data were normalized to the previously determined
capture cross section on tantalum. The microscopic
capture cross sections were converted to effective
capture cross sections in a Maxwellian neutron flux
